title: Data-Analysis for High-Frequency Trading

prerequisites.text: Acceptance into Master's programs in Statistics & Data Science or Data Science, and/or statistical background deemed sufficient by the Head of Department.

outline: The course aims to equip students with data-science skills required to manage and explore high-frequency financial market data. Topics include: managing large financial data-sets; statistical analysis of large data-sets; the link between statistical analysis of fast large data-sets, the modelling thereof, and how this can be used to understand and control real-time trading and risk systems in modern financial markets. Students will acquire skills in: Understanding and Preparing Financial Market Data; Data Science of Market Microstructure; Market Structure and Market Microstructure; Statistical Learning for Financial Market Data.
